name: Panhandle Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F. and generously grease a 12-cup bundt or 9-inch tube pan. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cornmeal and baking powder. Stir in the cheddar.
3. In a medium bowl, beat the eggs, oil, sour cream, corn, and chiles together.
4. Add the egg mixture to the cornmeal mixture. Stir until just moistened.
5. Spoon the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes in the preheated oven until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool on a rack for 10 minutes, then invert over a serving plate.
